message:
feat(codegen): Add vectorized list comprehension dispatch for large arrays

Automatically vectorize list comprehensions like [x * 2 for x in range(N)]
when N >= 10K elements. Uses optimized CPU vectorization with future Metal
GPU support infrastructure in place.

Changes:
- Add MetalInfo analysis to detect GPU-suitable list comprehensions
- Add genMetalListComp codegen for dispatching to runtime vectorization
- Create listcomp.zig with VectorOp enum and vectorizedListCompToArrayList
- Add Metal shaders for vector operations (future GPU acceleration)
- Fix Zig 0.15 API: callconv(.C) -> callconv(.c)
- Fix SIMD scalar cleanup to use native i64 arithmetic

The pitch: "Your standard Python for-loops run faster automatically."
